title: Map
subtitle: Shows only registered shops/activities.
geoInsecure: Geolocation requires opening the site over HTTPS.

mapListing.pageTitle: Add Your Business to the Map
mapListing.pageSubtitle: Add your business location so customers can find you on the map
mapListing.locationRequired: Please pick a location on the map
mapListing.geoError: Could not get your location, please try again
mapListing.submitError: Error submitting, please try again later
mapListing.reviewNote: Your listing will be reviewed and appear on the map within 24 hours after approval.
